objects.name: SonicWall security advisory (AV26-405)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-405 Date: April 29, 2026 On April 29, 2026, SonicWall published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products: Gen6 Hardware Firewalls – firmware version 6.5.5.1-6n and prior Gen7 NSv – firmware version 7.0.1-5169 and prior, firmware version 7.3.1-7013 and prior Gen7 Firewalls – firmware version 7.0.1-5169 and prior, firmware version 7.3.1-7013 and prior Gen8 Firewalls – firmware version 8.1.0-8017 and prior The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web links and...
